consistency.class_reference: The feature correctly references the 'fighter' class.
consistency.level_dependency: The healing calculation correctly depends on 'fighter level', which is standard for class features.
consistency.resource_management: The feature correctly specifies a rest requirement ('short or long rest') for recharge, which is consistent with similar self-heal mechanics.

quality.clarity: The description is very clear regarding action type ('bonus action') and effect ('regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level').
quality.completeness: All necessary mechanical details (action type, effect, cost/limitation) are present.

mechanics.recharge: Short or Long Rest (Uses: 1 per rest cycle)

analysis.notes: This is a standard, well-defined, and necessary level 1 fighter feature. The mechanics are balanced for a low-level martial class self-sustain option.
